scripts.dev: set -a; . ./.env; set +a; npm-run-all --parallel dev:web dev:api dev:region
scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && ./mvnw -f services/api-spring/pom.xml -DskipTests package && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace packages/shared run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run lint
